2328450.name: Fear The Unknown - Dave Story
2328450.description:
Fear the unknown ,In the game, you will play as one of the lucky ones who met them and survived.

Fear The Unknown : Dave Story

This episode tells the story of an ordinary working-class guy who was sent to work in a remote location, deep and far from civilization. He was incredibly lucky—his story reached us. Pay attention to the small details, as they may help you survive. This is just the beginning.

The Gameplay

This game offers a first-person narrative experience, blending walking simulation with elements of exploration, driving, drinking, and interactive conversations. It is a short game about UFO and aliens and is very inspired by x-files series, with approximately 30 minutes of gameplay.

Game Control

  • ASDW - Movements

  • [LMB] - Action

  • [RMB] - Task help , Drink

  • Support GamePad

Comments from the developer

Although we may sometimes appear similar to one another, each of us possesses unique qualities and new values.
